author: Brandjuh
description: SQLite-backed fire station management MVP for Red Discord Bot.
install_msg:
Thanks for installing FireStationCommander.

Use `[p]fsc start` to create a station, `[p]fsc status` for the dashboard, and `[p]fsc incident` to receive an incident.
name: FireStationCommander
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord user IDs, guild IDs, game progress, station state, personnel, vehicles, equipment, incidents, and incident reports in a local SQLite database.
